rationale: Active war remains the dominant reality for Ukrainians; the US-Iran deal negotiations continue to divide US attention away from Ukraine, maintaining the background concern about Western support levels.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal signing disputed — Sunday timeline unclear
top_events.summary: Continued US focus on Iran diplomacy keeps American attention and resources divided, potentially delaying or reducing military aid to Ukraine. No resolution yet, but the distraction persists.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: Western enforcement against Russia's shadow oil fleet tightens sanctions pressure on Moscow, which is modestly positive for Ukraine's war effort by constraining Russian revenues.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
top_events.summary: A human-interest story about Russian war casualties; no direct military or strategic impact on Ukraine's situation, but signals continued Russian public awareness of war losses.
